steps.title: Convert the arc measure
steps.content:
A $45^\circ$ arc is this fraction of the full $360^\circ$ circle:
$$\frac{45}{360}=\frac{1}{8}$$

steps.title: Scale to the circumference
steps.content: If $5$ inches is $$\frac{1}{8}$$ of the circumference, multiply by $8$ to get the full circumference. $$5\cdot8=40$$ The answer is D.
